hook: API gateways and WAFs inspect traffic at the edge before it reaches application services.
cta: Combine rate limiting, routing rules, and WAF signatures to block common attack patterns.

storyboardBeats.objective: Position the gateway as the controlled entry point for API traffic.
Gateway routes requests to backend services based on path and policy.
Rate limits throttle abusive clients before they reach origin servers.
WAF inspects payloads for injection, traversal, and known exploit signatures.
Clean requests pass to origin while blocked traffic is logged and dropped.
